attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT     
,BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD              
,FIXED_ASSET_NUM               
,DV_ASSET_ACCOUNT_CD           
,CIP_ACCOUNT_CD                
,EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_CD            
,SERIAL_NUM                    
,FA_TAG_NUM                    
,MODEL_NUM                     
,ASSET_DESCR                   
,ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT          
,ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT   
,ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT    
,INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE       
,ASST_DEPRECIABL_LIFE_MTH_CNT  
,DV_LIFE_YR_MNT                
,ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT         
,BOOKS_CURRENT_COST            
,BOOKS_USD_COST                
,BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD            
,REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT     
,RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY  
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        
,TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME     
,FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME   
,CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,DV_CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT       
,MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT             
,DV_USD_MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT      
,YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNC_AMT       
,DV_YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_USD_AMT     
,DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,USD_DEPRN_RESERVE_USD_AMT     
,DV_FUNCTIONAL_NET_BOOK_VAL_AMT
,DV_NET_BOOK_VAL_USD_AMT  
,'DCD' AS DV_DEPRECIATION_TYPE  
, DV_BAN_ID   
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_FIXED_ASSET_WITH_DEPRN WMFAD
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(  
SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIXED_ASSET_WITH_DEPRN MFAD
WHERE 
MFAD.BK_COMPANY_CD = WMFAD.BK_COMPANY_CD 
AND MFAD.FIXED_ASSET_NUM = WMFAD.FIXED_ASSET_NUM  
AND MFAD.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD = WMFAD.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
AND DV_DEPRECIATION_TYPE = 'DCD'
)

SELECT 
NFDP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT 
,NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD 
,GLEXP.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
,NFATD1.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM AS FIXED_ASSET_NUM
,(CASE WHEN NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_TYPE_CD ='CIP' THEN GLACIP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ELSE GLAST.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE END ) AS DV_ASSET_ACCOUNT_CD
,GLACIP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS CIP_ACCOUNT_CD
,GLEXP.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS EXPENSE_ACCOUNT_CD
,NFA.SERIAL_NUM AS SERIAL_NUM
,NFA.FA_TAG_NUM AS FA_TAG_NUM 
,NFA.MODEL_NUM AS MODEL_NUM
,NFA.ASSET_DESCR AS ASSET_DESCR
,NFATB.ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT 
,NFATB.ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT 
,NFATB.ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT AS ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT
,NFA.INTERNAL_EQUIPMENT_ROLE 
,NFATB.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT AS ASST_DEPRECIABL_LIFE_MTH_CNT
,(NFATB.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT/12 )||'.'|| TRIM(CAST ( NFATB.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT - (12 * ( NFATB.ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT/12)) AS INTEGER)) AS DV_LIFE_YR_MNT 
,NFATB.ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,NFATB.ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT 
,NFATB.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS BOOKS_CURRENT_COST
,NFATB.CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT AS BOOKS_USD_COST
,NFA.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD 
,NFATB.REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT 
,NFA.RU_INTERNAL_EQPMNT_ASSET_QTY 
,NGLS.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,NFATD1.RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME AS TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME
,NFATD1.RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME AS FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME 
,NFATD.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,NFATD.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT * CAST(MMCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT 
,NFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT AS MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT
,NFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT * CAST(MMCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_USD_MONTHLY_DEPRN_AMT
,NFATD1.YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNC_AMT
,NFATD1.YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT* CAST(MMCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_USD_AMT
,NFATD1.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,NFATD1.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT* CAST(MMCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS USD_DEPRN_RESERVE_USD_AMT
,COALESCE(NFATD1.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0) - COALESCE(NFATD1.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0) AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_NET_BOOK_VAL_AMT
,(COALESCE(NFATD1.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,0) - COALESCE(NFATD1.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,0)) * CAST(MMCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DV_NET_BOOK_VAL_USD_AMT
,(CASE WHEN FAPO.REQUISITION_CLASSIFICATION_CD='BAN Number' THEN FAPO.REQUISITION_CLASSIFICATION_ID ELSE NULL END) AS DV_BAN_ID
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_BOOK  NFATB
INNER JOIN 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
ON NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = NFATB.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
AND NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NFATB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD = NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION NFAT
ON ( 
NFATB.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY   = NFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY
AND NFAT.BK_FA_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD   ='ADDITION'
)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FA_DEPRECIATION_PERIOD NFDP
ON  ( NFAT.DD_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD =NFDP.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD 
AND  NFAT.SS_CD = NFDP.SS_CD
AND (NFAT.FA_TRANSACTION_EFFECTIVE_DTM    BETWEEN NFDP.PERIOD_ACTUAL_OPEN_DTM  
AND NFDP.PERIOD_ACTUAL_CLOSED_DTM)
AND (NFATB.FA_TRX_BOOK_EFFECTIVE_DTM  BETWEEN NFDP.PERIOD_ACTUAL_OPEN_DTM 
AND NFDP.PERIOD_ACTUAL_CLOSED_DTM) )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL NFATD
ON (NFATB.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = NFATD.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
AND NFATB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NFATD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD = NFATD.COMPANY_CD
AND NFDP.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT = NFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT
AND NFATD.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD  =NFDP.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD 
AND NFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT =
(  SELECT MAX(SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT)  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  NFATD2
WHERE  NFATD2.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =NFATD.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
AND NFATD2.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NFATD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NFATD2.COMPANY_CD = NFATD.COMPANY_CD
AND NFATD2.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT = NFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT
AND NFATD2.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD = NFATD.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
AND NFATD2.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE =   NFATD.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE 
)
AND NFATD.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE    ='D' 
)    
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  NFATD1
ON ( NFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT=NFATD1.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND NFATD1.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT= 
( SELECT MAX( NFATD3.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT) FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  NFATD3
WHERE   NFATD3.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM =NFATD1.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
AND NFATD3.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NFATD1.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NFATD3.COMPANY_CD = NFATD1.COMPANY_CD
AND NFATD3.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT = NFATD1.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND NFATD3.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD = NFATD1.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
AND NFATD3.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE =   NFATD1.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE 
)
AND NFATB.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM  = NFATD1.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
AND NFATB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = NFATD1.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD       = NFATD1.COMPANY_CD
AND NFATD1.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE    ='D'  )             
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLAST 
ON  GLAST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFA.ASSET_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLEXP 
ON GLEXP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFATD1.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT GLACIP
ON GLACIP.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY=  NFA.CIP_TARGET_ASSET_GL_ACCT_KEY
INNER JOIN
(   
SELECT  
NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
(CASE WHEN SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 THEN 'USD' ELSE NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE END) FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,
RFMTY_START. FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS START_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT , 
RFMTY_END. FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT  AS END_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV  NGL 
,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY_START
,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY_END
WHERE  
NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND GL_TYPE_CODE IN ( 'OPERATING', 'CONSOL ONLY')
AND NGL.START_TV_DATE = RFMTY_START.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE    
AND NGL.END_TV_DATE =  RFMTY_END.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   
UNION ALL
SELECT  
NGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
(CASE WHEN SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = 5 THEN 'USD' ELSE NGL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE END) FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
,          RFMTY_START. FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS START_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT ,   
CASE WHEN  END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01' THEN 350006  END AS  END_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
FROM   
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_TV  NGL 
, $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMTY_START
WHERE  NGL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND   GL_TYPE_CODE IN ( 'OPERATING', 'CONSOL ONLY')
AND  NGL.START_TV_DATE = RFMTY_START.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE    
AND END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
) NGLS 
ON  (NGLS.BK_COMPANY_CODE  = NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD
AND  NFDP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN NGLS.START_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND NGLS.END_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE MMCR
ON  (MMCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD = NGLS.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
AND MMCR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD = 'USD'
AND MMCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT = NFDP.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT FAP.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,FAP.BK_COMPANY_CD,FAP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,FAP.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,NPR.REQUISITION_CLASSIFICATION_CD,NPR.REQUISITION_CLASSIFICATION_ID
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FA_PO_LINK FAP
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON FAP.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY                =NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
																						
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT  PO 
ON NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY = PO.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
																																																																							
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE PR        
ON PO.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY   = PR.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY
AND PO.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY > 0
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION NPR
ON PR.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM=NPR.BK_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_NUM
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY FAP.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,FAP.BK_COMPANY_CD,FAP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
ORDER BY FAP.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY )=1) FAPO
ON (NFATB.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM=FAPO.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
AND NFATB.BK_COMPANY_CD=FAPO.BK_COMPANY_CD
AND NFATB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=FAPO.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
AND FAPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY > 0)
